# F-5 fixture #16 (T012 — should-NOT-fire)
# Allow-list mechanism: path regex `archive/.*` in `.gitleaks.toml` allow-list 3
# Simulated path: archive/<filename> (runner copies to TMPDIR/archive/...)
# Why this exists: archived/historical content under archive/ is read-only history;
# gitleaks should NOT scan it (we may have reasons to preserve old patterns for context)
